chainId.description: The EVM chain ID on which the block was created.

blockNumber.description: The block number on the chain.

blockTimestamp.description: The block creation (proposal) timestamp in seconds

blockTimestampMilliseconds.description: The block creation (proposal) timestamp in milliseconds. Available only after Granite upgrade.

blockMinDelayExcess.description: Minimum block delay in milliseconds. Available only after Granite upgrade.

txCount.description: The number of evm transactions in the block.

baseFee.description: The base gas fee for a transaction to be included in the block.

gasUsed.description: The gas used for transactions in the block.

gasLimit.description: The total gas limit set for transactions in the block.

parentHash.description: The hash of the parent block.

feesSpent.description: The amount of fees spent/burned for transactions in the block.

cumulativeTransactions.description: The cumulative number of transactions for the chain including this block.
